title: hypericum quadrangulum subsp. acutum
intro: Hypericum quadrangulum subsp. acutum is a subspecies of the St. John's Wort plant, known for its bright yellow flowers and medicinal properties. This plant is rich in bioactive compounds, particularly hyperforin and hypericin, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The medicinal properties of Hypericum quadrangulum subsp. acutum include its ability to reduce anxiety and depression, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes, as well as its potential to protect against oxidative stress and inflammation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, or used in capsule or tablet form, allowing for various forms of consumption to harness its medicinal benefits.
